name: Oven-Fried Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the instant mashed potatoes, salt, pepper, poultry seasoning, and beaten egg in a plastic bag.
2. In a separate bowl, mix the lemon juice with the beaten egg.
3. Dip each chicken breast into the lemon/egg mixture.
4. Shake the chicken breasts to coat them evenly in the potato mixture.
5. Place the coated chicken breasts in a baking dish.
6. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for about 45 minutes, or until cooked through and golden brown.
Our whole family loves it.
